features.details: Fixed PullRequest 'head' attribute access error by creating safe accessor utilities

solution.problem: PullRequest object missing 'head' attribute causing AttributeError
solution.approach: Created safe accessor utilities with proper error handling and fallback mechanisms
key_functions: safe_get_pr_attr - Safe attribute access for objects and dicts

overall_approach: Created utility module with safe accessor functions for PullRequest objects, handling both object and dict access patterns with proper error handling
potential_risks: Existing code may need to be updated to use the new safe accessors
Tests need to be run to verify all edge cases are covered
